name: hb_1_12
requirements: As part of your analysis, for Shougang Jingtang Steel United Co., Ltd. over 2025-06-10 to 2025-06-12 compute and store: total_flue_gas, mean_exhaust, peak_exhaust (float), peak_offset_hours (whole hours from 2025-06-10 00:00 to the peak, int), active_hours (int).

turns.query: Identify the high emission periods of Shougang Jingtang Steel United Co., Ltd. during 2025-06-10 to 2025-06-12 and analyze the emission peak patterns.
